The '''''FireStar''-class Orbital Defense Station''' was designed and manufactured by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Petabys Station]] was a ''FireStar''-class [[Orbit/Legends|Orbital]] Defense [[Space station/Legends|Station]] acquired by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[black marketeer]] [[Uopled]].<ref name="HideoutsStrongholds">''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
The FireStar was armed with 148 [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and 60 [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. The central section of the FireStar contained landing pads and hangars, while four towers pierced the platforms and rose eleven levels above and five levels below the central section.

The FireStar could handle up to 500 passengers, and could store enough supplies for six months.
